channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dies from cancer at age 78
item.description: Greg Gumbel, a longtime CBS sportscaster who broke barriers during his career calling some of the biggest sporting events, has died from cancer, according to a statement from family released by the news network on Friday.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Scottie Scheffler injures right hand on a broken glass, withdraws from PGA Tour opener in Hawaii
item.description: Scottie Scheffler injured his right hand on a broken glass preparing Christmas dinner, forcing the top-ranked player to withdraw from the PGA Tour’s season-opening event in Hawaii.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kings fire coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his 3rd season, AP source says
item.description: The Sacramento Kings have fired coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his third season with the team mired in a five-game losing streak, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Simone Biles sports custom Jonathan Owens outfit to Bears' final home game
item.description: Olympic gymnast Simone Biles wore a custom outfit dedicated to her husband, Chicago Bears safety Jonathan Owens, to his team's final home game of the season on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Longtime sports anchor, announcer Greg Gumbel dies at 78
item.description: Longtime announcer and anchor Greg Gumbel, who called NFL games and was a CBS studio host for college basketball, has died at the age of 78.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' Nick Sirianni clears the air after heated postgame confrontation with former player Zach Ertz
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni said Thursday that he and former Eagles player Zach Ertz, now with the Washington Commanders, are all good after they got into a postgame confrontation following the Eagles' loss to the Commanders on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL legend Eric Dickerson keeps it brutally honest about Saquon Barkley chasing his rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley is 268 yards away from becoming the NFL's single-season rushing record holder, but Eric Dickerson is rooting for Barkley to come up short.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Woolen's late interception seals win as Seahawks beat struggling Bears 6-3 to boost playoff hopes
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Seattle Seahawks made just enough plays to boost their fading playoff hopes by beating the struggling Chicago Bears on Thursday night. Now, they'll be rooting for the Arizona Cardinals to beat the Los Angeles Rams this weekend.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Defense steps up for the Bears, but the offense struggles in a 6-3 loss to the Seahawks
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The defense delivered for the Chicago Bears. It was one of the team's best performances of the season on that side of the ball. Just not good enough. “I guess we should have held them to three points or zero points at the end of the day,” safety Kevin Byard said.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jim Larrañaga steps down at Miami, Bill Courtney takes over to finish season
item.description: CORAL GABLES, Fla. (AP) — Jim Larrañaga insists he still loves the University of Miami, still loves the game of basketball, still loves mentoring players, still loves coaching. He doesn't love what college basketball has become. And with that, he's leaving.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DeSean Jackson finalizing deal to become latest ex-NFL star to land college head coaching job: report
item.description: DeSean Jackson has become the latest ex-NFL player to join the collegiate ranks. He is reportedly finalizing a deal with Delaware State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bucks roll past Bulls, 112-91, despite being without 2 star players
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — No Dame, no Giannis, no problem for the Milwaukee Bucks on Monday night. The Bulls, on the other hand, had plenty of them.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah blows 3-goal lead in shootout loss to Anaheim
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Robby Fabbri scored twice, and the Anaheim Ducks rallied from down three goals to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-4 in a shootout at Delta Center on Sunday. “I think we just didn't stray away from our game,” said Fabbri.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs' Cody Mauch adjusting to and enjoying Tampa Bay's warm winters
item.description: Bucs' offensive lineman Cody Mauch is in his second year in the NFL, which means he is spending another Christmas in paradise.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Panthers use short-handed goals to beat Lightning 4-2 in opener of home-and-home set
item.description: A.J. Greer and Eetu Luostarinen scored short-handed goals 42 seconds apart in the second period to help the Florida Panthers beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-2 on Sunday to open a home-and-home series.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: GJ Tigers Grant Lewis and Will Weirath shine under varsity spotlight
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Grant Lewis and Will Weirath aren’t your average freshmen. They’re not just competing with older, more experienced players — they’re excelling. Their combined 25-point performance in the Tigers’ recent win highlights their remarkable season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Tiger's son makes the ace. Bernhard Langer makes the winning putt in playoff over Woods at PNC
item.description: Tiger Woods never had so much fun losing in a playoff. For the 67-year-old Bernhard Langer, it never gets old winning the PNC Championship with his son.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What to know for the Mizzou-Illinois Braggin' Rights game and how to watch
item.description: It's almost time for another Braggin' Rights matchup between two cross-state college basketball rivals: The Missouri Tigers and Illinois Fighting Illini.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Ryans, WGN 9

item.title: Northwestern demolishes DePaul in crosstown showdown
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. (WGN) — An early blitz on the offensive end and playmaking down the stretch from Brooks Barnhizer and Nick Martinelli helped seal a convincing win for Northwestern over DePaul in the yearly crosstown showdown between the two programs.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes throws for TD and runs for score as Chiefs beat Texans 27-19 to close in on No. 1 seed
item.description: Patrick Mahomes knew he could run on the ankle he sprained last week. The bigger concern for the Chiefs quarterback was how he would stop, when all the weight and pressure and momentum would land squarely upon it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rickey Henderson, MLB's all-time stolen base leader, dies at 65
item.description: Rickey Henderson, the man who changed Major League Baseball with his blazing, unbeatable speed, has died, the league confirmed. The all-time MLB leader in stolen bases and one of the games greatest leadoff hitters died in Oakland on Friday after a bout with pneumonia, TMZ reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
